headline: Neonatal Ventilator Market Research Report 2026-2031: Increasing Adoption of NAVA, and Shift Towards Non-Invasive & Hybrid Ventilators
summary: The global neonatal ventilators market is projected to grow at a CAGR of 4.63% between 2025 and 2031. Key segments include consumables & accessories, non-invasive ventilators, standalone ventilators, and hospital end-users. North America leads the market, with the U.S. holding 87% by 2025. Industry highlights include GE HealthCare's acquisition of Intelerad and Philips’ strategic alliances to enhance clinical workflows. Innovations like Hamilton Medical's HAMILTON-C6 Neo ventilator support marke
